title: Cedar Authorization Configuration
description: Configuration for the Cedar authorization extension. Evaluates Cedar policies inline to authorize HTTP requests.

entities_file.description: Path to a JSON file containing Cedar entities for hierarchy support.

principal_type.description: Cedar entity type for the principal (e.g. "User").

principal_id_header.description: Request header from which to extract the principal ID.

action_type.description: Cedar entity type for actions. Defaults to "Action".

resource_type.description: Cedar entity type for resources. Defaults to "Resource".

deny_status.description: HTTP status code returned when a request is denied. Defaults to 403.

deny_body.description: Response body returned when a request is denied. Defaults to "Forbidden".

deny_headers.description: Additional headers to include in deny responses.

fail_open.description: If true, allow requests when policy evaluation fails. Defaults to false.

dry_run.description: If true, log authorization decisions without enforcing them. Defaults to false.

metadata_namespaces.description: List of dynamic metadata namespaces to include in the Cedar context record under the "dynamic_metadata" key.

DataSource.description: A data source provided either inline or as a file path. Exactly one must be set.

inline.description: Data provided directly as a string.

file.description: Path to a file containing the data.
